name: Hearty Meatless Chili
recipeIngredient: Celery Stalks - 1 large stalk, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Choose one soup mix: Onion, Onion-Mushroom, or Beefy Mushroom.
2. Rinse and drain chick peas and red kidney beans.
3. Prepare tomatoes by peeling whole ones and chopping them without draining.
4. Coarsely chop the celery stalks.
5. In a large saucepan or stockpot, combine all ingredients.
6. Bring to a boil, then simmer uncovered for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Cover and continue simmering with occasional stirring for an additional 30 minutes until lentils are tender and liquid is almost absorbed.
8. Serve over hot cooked brown or white rice, topped with shredded cheddar cheese if desired. Makes about 4 servings (2 cups each).
